_comment: Phase 12.16 — example DERP map for MDE Headscale. Q4 locked single-region (Host-role peer hosts one self-hosted DERP server); Q16 lock keeps Tailscale's public DERP set in the list as fallback. The Host-role peer's hostname is plugged into the example below; rotate-on-promotion replaces it when the Host role moves.

_inherit_tailscale_public._comment: Tailscale's public DERP regions (1..n) are inherited automatically by Headscale unless --derp-tailscale=false is set on the headscale daemon. The mde-self region above is appended ahead of them so the self-hosted relay is preferred when reachable; the public set is the fallback if self-hosted is down.
